How It Works

Two Layers. One Story.

Create without pressure. Share with intention. NichiKai is built around one simple philosophy.

Studio — Default

Draft in Private

Every Arc starts in Studio. No metrics. No audience. Just you and your story. Experiment freely — your creative space is always safe.

  • Private by default — only you can see
  • No follower counts, no pressure
  • Save drafts, return anytime
  • Unlimited Arcs and Episodes
Stage — Intentional

Take the Stage

When your story is ready, publish it. Your Arc appears on the Discover Shelf. Your SE season stamp is set. Your story is now in the world.

  • Public Arc appears on the Discover Shelf
  • Season stamp auto-generated on publish
  • Comments unlock after full Episode read
  • Bookmark to Shelf — readers curate you

What Makes NichiKai Different

Built for Storytellers.
Not Scrollers.

Core

Arcs & Episodes

Your life unfolds in Episodes grouped into Arcs — serialized chapters of your real story. Close an Arc when a season ends. Begin a new one when life turns a page.

Discover

The Manga Shelf

Browse other people's lives like manga volumes in a bookstore. Tap a spine to preview. Tap the cover to begin reading. No algorithm. No infinite scroll.

Social

Bookmark to Shelf

No likes. No vanity metrics. Bookmark an Arc to your shelf. Your reading life becomes part of your public profile — quiet social discovery without the noise.

Reading

Comments After Completion

Comments unlock only after you finish an Episode — every panel, in order. The conversation is a reward for reading, not a distraction from it.

Creator

Manga Panel Layout

Arrange Episodes as Hero, Scene, or Slice panels. Write a caption — NichiKai auto-places it as a speech bubble. Toggle halftone grain. Your profile reads like a real manga volume.

Culture

Built for the Culture

Right-to-left reading. Season stamps. In-universe language. NichiKai is built from inside manga culture — not borrowing from it. Authentic to its roots, every panel.

Pricing

Ink is Free.
Color is the Dream.

No microtransactions. No pay-to-boost. Monetization tied to creative enhancement — never to visibility.

Free Forever
Ink Edition
$0 — Always free
  • Black & white manga panels
  • 3 Ink styles: Classic, Sketch, Noir
  • Halftone grain toggle
  • Auto speech bubble placement
  • Unlimited Arcs and Episodes
  • 1 free Color Episode per month

The Ink Edition is genuinely beautiful. Color is an upgrade, not a requirement.

Studio Pass
Color Edition
~$4.99–7.99 / month
  • Full color manga panels
  • 6 styles: Shounen, Shoujo, Seinen, Chibi, Retro, Watercolor
  • AI color transformation — coming post-launch
  • Premium Arc cover art tools
  • Custom profile themes
  • Early access to every new feature

Founding Members get early access to AI Color the moment it ships.

Season 1 — 1,000 Spots Only

Become a Founding Member

Season 1 is a closed release for the first 1,000 members of the NichiKai world. Founding Members carry a permanent SE1 badge — the mark of those who were here before the story began.

SE1 Founding Badge
Free Color Episode Monthly
Credits in App
Early Access Always

Season 1 closes at 1,000 Founding Members. Don't miss the opening Arc.
